data.title: Anning
data.synopsis: People can't bear all kinds of suffering in the world, and they struggle to rise up on the path to peace and tranquility. In the end, people pay a huge price to get peace and tranquility.

data.title: Baxian Yu Tiaozao
data.synopsis:
When the Eight Immortals crossed the East Sea, each displaying their unique abilities, the Dragon King of the East Sea nearly tried to stop them. After a fierce battle, the Dragon King yielded and transformed into a dragon boat for the Eight Immortals to leisurely board, allowing them to cross the East Sea smoothly. Upon reaching the shore, the Eight Immortals rested at an inn when a flea suddenly appeared, visiting one immortal after another, harassing them. The Eight Immortals tried together to catch it, but no matter how hard they tried, the flea remained unharmed. Just as the Eight Immortals were feeling dejected, they saw the innkeeper's waiter easily catch the flea with his hand, rendering it powerless. They were astonished.

(Source: Douban, translated)

titles.title: The Tall Woman and Short Husband

data.title: Gao Nuren He Ai Zhangfu
data.title_english: The Tall Woman and Short Husband

data.title: Aaron He Lili
data.synopsis:
This story tells of the friendship between a dog named Aaron and a fox named Lili.

Aaron and Lili have been best friends since they were little, but Aaron's owner wanted to capture Lili. In the end, Lili used her intelligence to save Aaron, and Aaron's owner stopped chasing her.

(Source: Douban, translated)

data.title: Ben Gouxiong
data.synopsis:
A bear celebrates a bumper harvest. As he happily prepares to make pancakes to celebrate, he's harassed by a pack of mice. After a chase, the clumsy bear is frustrated and defeated by the mice.

The bear seeks help from a tabby cat, but when the cat catches mice for him, the bear finds them too small and imposes a rule that fat mice can only be traded for fat fish, while the other two can only eat thin fish. This angers the cat. To get the big, fat fish, the cat devises a clever plan: first, he uses the bear's food to feed the mice until they're well-fed, and then he gives them away. This way, the bear gets the fat rats he imagined, but loses his precious food.

data.title: Senlin Li De Jin Yueliang
data.synopsis: The moon hangs high, and a band is playing under the command of a lion on the top of the mountain... The lunar eclipse is quietly going on, the music stops abruptly, all the animals are commotion, and the little red bird tells everyone that this is a lunar eclipse. The lion and all the animals believed the wolf and the fox's deception, thinking that the tengu ate the golden moon. In the night, the deception hangs over the forest.

data.title: Gudu De Lily
data.synopsis: The protagonist of Gudu De Lily is a young girl named Lily who dreams of one day becoming a famous singer. She sets off on a mission to reach her dreams with the help of her friends. She encounters several challenges along the journey and gains insightful knowledge about courage, friendship, and determination. Lily learns how to use music to express her feelings and realizes her true potential with the aid of her companions.

data.title: Ai Ni
data.synopsis:
An old man and a young man were selling apples on opposite sides of a large tree. The old man's apples were large and red, while the young man's looked good, but many had wormholes. Since the prices were the same and the old man had a kind face, customers gradually flocked to his stall. To sell more apples, the young man lowered his price and rearranged the apples, showing only the best side to customers, which indeed attracted many more. After finishing their business, the two took a ferry home together, and the young man again tried to take advantage of the old man. The ferry was interrupted by a sudden wave, and the two men and the boatman fell into the water. The old man, finding his money bag too heavy, threw it away, but the young man, seeing this, risked his life to retrieve it.

(Source: Douban, translated)

data.title: Lu He Niu
data.synopsis: Deer and bull have to deal with a lion.
